intent.responsibility: Own one reusable runtime-selected phone application list item.
intent.visualBoundary: Own one bounded item surface and the ordered Avatar, Label and Icon Row child composition.
intent.runtimeBehavior: Resolve one numbered Content Set and one Normal, Pressed or Inactive state from exact Runtime Inputs.
intent.forwarding: Forward only the active Content Set exact child Runtime contracts to the fixed Avatar, Label and Icon Row boundaries.
intent.temporalOwnership: Own the List Item boundary Motion plus activeSet and state tracks relative to the List Item temporal owner.

component.name: List Item
component.notes: Reusable item model with Variant-authored composition and Runtime content sets.

metadata.note: List Item owns fixed Avatar, Label and Icon Row slots, a numeric Content Set count, and exact child Runtime contracts.

cards.label: Components
cards.subtitle: Fixed child slots and Content Sets
